# Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)

> The Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) is a solution for enabling gen AI agents to make payments on behalf of users, safely, securely, and in a decentralized and privacy protecting manner. This protocol is a part of the broader ecosystem, which includes agentic protocols like A2A and MCP, and encompasses the global nature of payments.


## Specification

- [Overview](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/overview/index.md)
- [Overview](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/checkout/index.md)
- [HTTP/REST Binding](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/checkout-rest/index.md)
- [MCP Binding](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/checkout-mcp/index.md)
- [A2A Binding](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/checkout-a2a/index.md)
- [EP Binding](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/embedded-checkout/index.md)
- [AP2 Mandates Extension](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/ap2-mandates/index.md)
- [Buyer Consent Extension](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/buyer-consent/index.md)
- [Discounts Extension](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/discount/index.md)
- [Fulfillment Extension](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/fulfillment/index.md)
- [Order Capability](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/order/index.md)
- [Identity Linking Capability](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/identity-linking/index.md)
- [Guide](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/payment-handler-guide/index.md)
- [Template](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/payment-handler-template/index.md)
- [Tokenization Guide](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/tokenization-guide/index.md)
- [Processor Tokenizer](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/examples/processor-tokenizer-payment-handler/index.md)
- [Platform Tokenizer](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/examples/platform-tokenizer-payment-handler/index.md)
- [Encrypted Credential](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/examples/encrypted-credential-handler/index.md)
- [Reference](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/reference/index.md)
- [Playground](http://ucp.dev/2026-01-23/specification/playground/index.md)
